in the Kuopio area for private and business customers.
index.card1Text: We use professional-grade cleaning products, proper methods, and the right tools.
index.card2Text: We always stick to agreed schedules and deliver service as promised.
index.card3Text: We are honest, keep our word, and leave every job spotless.

about.goalTitle:
Our goal is to ensure
your space is clean.
about.goalDesc: Pohjoisen Helmi provides reliable and professional cleaning services in the Kuopio area. We specialize in construction and final cleaning, maintenance cleaning, and move-out cleaning.
about.processSubtitle:
We offer a simple and efficient process so you get
a clean, healthy space without hassle.
about.step1Text: Book your service easily online in just a few minutes.
about.step2Text: Our professional cleaning service delivers the best results while respecting your privacy.
about.step3Text: We ensure premises and construction sites are ready for use and tidy on the agreed schedule.

contactPage.sectionSubtitle:
Reach us in the way that suits you best. We answer all inquiries
within 24 hours.

tools.introSubtitle:
We invest in industry-leading cleaning equipment to deliver excellent results.
Many of our professional machines are also available for rent — do the job right.
tools.catalogSubtitle: Browse our full range — from heavy industrial machines to precision hand tools.
tools.tool1Text: Heavy 3600W wet-and-dry vacuum with HEPA filtration, perfect for deep cleaning carpets, upholstery, and hard floors in large commercial spaces.
tools.tool2Text: Walk-behind automatic floor scrubber with adjustable scrub pressure and drying system, ideal for large tile or polished concrete surfaces.
tools.tool3Text: High-pressure steam disinfection that kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses without chemicals. Great for kitchens, bathrooms, and allergy-sensitive environments.
tools.tool4Text: 3000 PSI electric pressure washer for outdoor surfaces, driveways, building facades, and outdoor furniture. Removes dirt quickly and efficiently.
tools.tool5Text: Complete water-fed pole system for streak-free window cleaning up to 12 m high. Includes squeegees, microfiber cloths, and a pure water filtration unit.
tools.tool6Text: Professional carpet extraction machine with hot water for deep cleaning. Effectively removes stains, allergens, and embedded dirt.
tools.whySubtitle: Every machine is maintained, certified, and ready for professional use.
tools.why1Text: All equipment meets industry safety standards. Every tool is tested before rental to ensure reliable and safe operation.
tools.why2Text: Book online or call us and pick up your rental the same day. Flexible daily, weekly, and weekend packages available.
tools.why3Text: Not sure which tool to choose? Our team provides practical guidance and instructions with every rental.
tools.rentalFormSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we will confirm availability and pricing within 2 hours.
